name: Front 3/4 Driver Side
description: Shoot from the front-left corner at 45°. Wheels angled to the left, panoramic roof open. Car fills the frame with a little ground showing.

name: Front Straight On
description: Stand directly in front, centred on the bonnet badge. Keep the car level in frame — bumper to roof visible.

name: Front 3/4 Passenger Side
description: Shoot from the front-right corner at 45°. Wheels straight, full front and passenger side visible.

name: Front 3/4 Driver Side (Closed)
description: Same angle as shot 1 but wheels straight and roof closed. Shows the clean roofline.

name: Rear 3/4 Passenger Side
description: Shoot from the rear-right corner at 45°. Full rear and passenger side in frame, number plate clearly visible.

name: Rear Straight On
description: Stand directly behind the car, centred on the boot badge. Full rear bumper to roof in frame.

name: Rear 3/4 Driver Side
description: Shoot from the rear-left corner at 45°. Full rear and driver side in frame.

name: Driver Side Profile
description: Stand back and shoot the full driver side in profile. All four wheels visible, car centred in frame.

name: Passenger Side Profile
description: Stand back and shoot the full passenger side in profile. All four wheels visible, car centred in frame.

name: Boot Open
description: Stand directly behind the car with the boot fully open. Capture the full boot opening and interior.

name: Sunroof Exterior (Open)
description: Stand on a step or shoot at an angle to capture the open sunroof from the exterior. Show the full glass panel open.

name: Sunroof Interior (Open)
description: Shoot upward from inside the car with the sunroof open. Frame the sky through the open glass panel.

name: Sunroof Interior (Closed)
description: Shoot upward from inside the car with the sunroof closed. Show the full glass panel from below.

name: Headlight Close-Up
description: Close-up of the driver-side headlight. Fill the frame with the light unit — show the LED detail clearly.

name: Brake Light Close-Up
description: Close-up of the driver-side rear light. Fill the frame with the light cluster.

name: Spoiler Close-Up
description: Shoot the rear spoiler from behind and slightly above. Show its full width and profile.

name: Door Handle Close-Up
description: Close-up of the driver's door handle. Fill the frame — capture the keyhole detail.

name: Door Mirror Close-Up
description: Close-up of the driver-side door mirror. Fill the frame, show the indicator strip.

name: Parking Sensor Close-Up
description: Close-up of one of the front parking sensors in the bumper. Fill the frame with the sensor detail.

name: Front Wheel / Alloy — Driver Side
description: Shoot the driver-side front wheel straight on. Alloy fills the frame, tyre lettering visible.

name: Rear Wheel / Alloy — Driver Side
description: Shoot the driver-side rear wheel straight on. Alloy fills the frame, tyre lettering visible.

name: Rear Wheel / Alloy — Passenger Side
description: Shoot the passenger-side rear wheel straight on. Alloy fills the frame, tyre lettering visible.

name: Front Wheel / Alloy — Passenger Side
description: Shoot the passenger-side front wheel straight on. Alloy fills the frame, tyre lettering visible.

name: Driver View Close-Up
description: Sit in the driver's seat and shoot across the dashboard towards the passenger side. Capture the full dash, steering wheel and infotainment.

name: Overview — Front Seats Wide Angle
description: Stand outside the car and shoot through the windscreen or open door for a wide overview of both front seats.

name: Passenger View Close-Up
description: Sit in the passenger seat and shoot across towards the driver's side. Capture the dash, steering wheel and door card.

name: Front Seats — From Driver Door
description: Open the driver's door and shoot across to show both front seats from door height.

name: Front Seats — From Passenger Door
description: Open the passenger door and shoot across to show both front seats from door height.

name: Rear Seats — Passenger Side Rear Door
description: Open the rear passenger door and shoot across the rear bench. Show full width of rear seating.

name: Rear Seats — Driver Side Rear Door
description: Open the rear driver's door and shoot across the rear bench. Show full width of rear seating.

name: Rear Seats — Wide Angle Overview
description: Shoot from the boot opening looking forward at the rear bench. Capture full width and headroom.

name: ISOFIX Point
description: Close-up of the ISOFIX anchor point on the rear seat. Show the latch clearly.

name: Electric Seat Adjustment Controls
description: Close-up of the driver's electric seat adjustment buttons on the door card.

name: Heated Seat Controls
description: Close-up of the heated seat buttons on the climate control panel. Illuminate if possible.

name: Rear Seat Heating & USB Ports
description: Shoot the rear seat heating buttons and USB ports on the back of the centre console.

name: Infotainment — Reversing Camera
description: Shoot the infotainment screen showing the live reversing camera view.

name: Infotainment — Nav Map
description: Shoot the infotainment screen showing the navigation map. Ensure the map is visible and not glared out.

name: Infotainment — DAB Radio
description: Shoot the infotainment screen on the DAB radio screen, station name visible.

name: Instrument Cluster / Digital Dash
description: Shoot the digital instrument cluster straight on with the car running. Speedo and power gauge visible.

name: Gear Stick / Selector
description: Close-up of the rotary gear selector on the centre console. Fill the frame.

name: Door Card — Mirror & Window Controls
description: Close-up of the driver's door card showing the mirror adjustment joystick and all window buttons.

name: Door Lock / Unlock Buttons
description: Close-up of the central locking buttons on the driver's door card.

name: Headlight Control Dial
description: Close-up of the headlight rotary dial on the dashboard. All icons visible.

name: Front Cup Holders
description: Shoot the front cup holder recess in the centre console from above.

name: Steering Wheel Controls — Left
description: Close-up of the left-hand steering wheel control pod. All buttons visible.

name: Steering Wheel Controls — Right
description: Close-up of the right-hand steering wheel control pod. All buttons visible.

name: Lights Stalk
description: Close-up of the indicator / lights stalk on the steering column.

name: Wiper Stalk
description: Close-up of the wiper stalk on the opposite side of the steering column.

name: Engine Start / Stop Button
description: Close-up of the engine start/stop button. Green indicator light should be visible.

name: Park Brake & Auto-Hold Buttons
description: Close-up of the electronic park brake and auto-hold buttons on the centre console.

name: Front USB-C, USB-A & 12V Socket
description: Shoot the front USB-C, USB-A and 12V socket cluster in the centre console cubby.

name: AC / Climate Control Panel
description: Straight-on shot of the full climate control panel. All dials and buttons clearly visible.

name: Speaker
description: Close-up of the branded speaker grille showing the B&O logo.

name: Sunglasses Holder (Open)
description: Shoot the overhead sunglasses holder with the door open, revealing the storage compartment.

name: Overhead Console
description: Shoot the full overhead console showing sunroof controls, lighting buttons and SOS button.

name: Exterior Camera
description: Close-up of the exterior reversing camera on the rear of the car.

name: Power Tailgate Button
description: Close-up of the power tailgate release button inside the boot area.

name: Boot Interior
description: Shoot the boot interior from the rear, fully open and empty. Show the full load floor and side walls.
